summary: Billing Portal & Tracking Middleware testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified - Billing portal page loads with overview cards, subscriptions/payments tabs, active/canceled subscriptions with unsubscribe/resubscribe buttons, payment history table, and Browse Marketplace button. MyStrategiesPage has Manage Billing button linking to /billing. Unauthenticated users correctly redirected to /login. Tracking middleware sends page_view and api_call events to /api/admin/track.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/billing/overview correctly returns active_subscriptions, monthly_cost, total_spent, total_payments for authenticated user
GET /api/billing/subscriptions correctly returns active and canceled subscriptions with strategy details
GET /api/billing/payments correctly returns payment transaction history with date, strategy, amount, status
POST /api/admin/track correctly records page_view and api_call events without requiring auth
Billing portal page at /billing renders all 4 overview cards (Active Subscriptions: 1, Monthly Cost: $9.99, Total Spent: $0.00, Total Payments: 0)
Subscriptions tab shows 1 active subscription (BTC Momentum Alpha) with Unsubscribe button
Subscriptions tab shows 4 canceled subscriptions with Resubscribe buttons
Payment History tab shows 4 payment rows with Date, Strategy, Amount, Status columns
Tab switching between Subscriptions and Payment History works correctly
Unauthenticated user is correctly redirected to /login when accessing /billing
MyStrategiesPage at /me/strategies has 'Manage Billing' button linking to /billing
Browse Marketplace button on billing page correctly links to /strategy-marketplace
Frontend tracking middleware (trackingMiddleware.js) installs axios interceptor for auto-tracking API calls
useTracking hook initializes middleware and sends page views on route change
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Pro user demo_test2@my-alpha-ai.com has 1 active subscription and 4 canceled subscriptions with 4 payment transactions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing Portal fully tested. Route /billing requires auth (redirects to /login if not authenticated). Pro user has 1 active sub (BTC Momentum Alpha) and 4 canceled subs. Payment transactions show 'initiated' status (pending). Tracking middleware auto-tracks API calls via axios interceptor and page views on route change. Key test IDs: billing-portal-page, billing-title, billing-overview-cards, billing-tabs, billing-tab-subscriptions, billing-tab-payments, subscriptions-section, payments-section, payments-table, active-sub-{n}, canceled-sub-{n}, resubscribe-btn, browse-marketplace-btn, manage-billing-btn.
